headline: CrowdStrike FedRAMP Win Puts Public Sector Growth Versus Valuation In Focus
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) has received FedRAMP High Authorization for its Falcon for XIoT offering. The authorization allows Falcon for XIoT to be used to secure mission critical federal operational and connected systems at the highest FedRAMP impact level. CrowdStrike also introduced expanded GovCloud capabilities for U.S. public sector customers. CrowdStrike focuses on cloud delivered cybersecurity, and the new FedRAMP High Authorization places Falcon for XIoT within the...

headline: CrowdStrike, AWS, and NVIDIA Announce Startup Accelerator Finalists Ahead of RSAC™ 2026; Robert Herjavec Joins as Celebrity Judge
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, March 19, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced the six finalists for the third annual Cybersecurity Startup Accelerator with Amazon Web Services (AWS) and NVIDIA through its Inception program – with finalists set to take the stage at Startup Nest, the live pitch event at RSAC™ 2026, where the next generation of cybersecurity leaders is decided. Cybersecurity expert and entrepreneur Robert Herjavec will also join the Startup Nest judging panel.

content.title: CrowdStrike, AWS, and NVIDIA Announce Startup Accelerator Finalists Ahead of RSAC™ 2026; Robert Herjavec Joins as Celebrity Judge

Cybersecurity expert and entrepreneur Robert Herjavec will also join the Startup Nest judging panel.
